title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates!
